utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget. The additional_services entry is present but empty, so it is not fully specified (no services or costs are given). The total_budget entry includes monthly cost, annual cost, and currency—fully specified. Therefore, 4 out of 5 items are fully specified.
